title: Otohime Saves a Celestial Dragon
description: On pages 1–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is otohime saves a celestial dragon.
scene: The scene follows otohime saves a celestial dragon, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A tenryubito ship?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It looks like it was attacked by deep-sea creatures ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...why are there tenryubito here in the depths...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hurry it up already !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Blast it all...!!! Those worth-less fools, dying one after another....!!! *pant*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You there!!! Fish!!! Bring me my mask at once!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Stench of Fish in this place is simply unbearable !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: *Pant*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hurry up and bring me my mask!! Save my life, do you hear me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: *Pant*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Bring a doctor!! *pant*... *pant*...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: A doctor, you hear?!! ... *pant* ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I am dying!! I require treatment !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: where are the medical team...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're here with us, but... I don't think anyone knows quite how to handle that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We should kill him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That lowest of the world's trash...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It sure is noisy out there....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sounds like a wrecked tenryubito ship has arrived on the island seeking refuge!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Cap'n Vander Becken!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Bahoho hoh...! Now, that sounds entertaining ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...this isn't how it was supposed to go...

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: EH?! The fish-man slaves have gone back to fish-man Island?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But why, Daddy Dearest ...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, my dear boy, it seems that a fish-man named Jimbel has joined the Shichibukai...

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: ...and the members of his pirate crew, the sun pirates, have been returned to their home.

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: Including those who were once slaves...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I will go and get them back, Daddy dearest!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: ...I paid good money for that wonderful collection of fish-man slaves !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey - wait, you guys!! What are you planning on doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: EH?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Someone who knows

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: Ahhh!! It's you!!! My slaves !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...you must return with me immediately!! Who gave you permission to leave, fish?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Nyha Aaaah!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: GRUSH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Stop it, you guys!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's a tenryubito!! If you attack him, even your pardons will count for nothing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...fools. Know your place and stop this at once.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you not realise who I am ?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: *Pant*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In the world above, your position is protected...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...by the threat of marine admirals coming to defend you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we're in the depths. As long as the people here keep quiet...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...this will be no more than an "accident at sea"...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He's got a point ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Well, I'm not gonna say anything!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: me either!! Why should I?!

summary: Otohime Saves a Celestial Dragon. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
